LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-24-2018 HEARING ON DEFENDANTS ANTHEM BLUE CROSS AND REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. AS PLAINTIFFS EFFECTIVELY CONCEDE THEY SHOULD BE, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRERS ARE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. SEVERAL OF THE ISSUES RAISED SHOULD HAVE BEEN RESOLVED IN THE MEET-AND-CONFER REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 430.41. IF AN AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED, COUNSEL ARE URGED TO MEET AND CONFER IN GOOD FAITH BEFORE FILING ANY MORE DEMURRERS. (SEE ID.) ORDER SIGNED. (PLEASE NOTE: A SINGLE ORDER WAS FILED THIS DATE FOR BOTH THE DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE - SEE ORDER FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM. (302/RBU)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-24-2018 HEARING ON DEFENDANTS ANTHEM BLUE CROSS AND REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. GIVEN THE CONTEMPORANEOUS RULING ON THEIR DEMURRERS, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE IS MOOT. AGAIN, IF AN AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED, COUNSEL ARE URGED TO MEET AND CONFER IN GOOD FAITH BEFORE FILING FURTHER PLEADING MOTIONS. ORDER SIGNED. (PLEASE NOTE: A SINGLE ORDER WAS FILED THIS DATE FOR BOTH THE DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE - SEE ORDER FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Lilienstein, Esq. of DL Law Group, 415.678.5050, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Karen Braje, Esq. of Reed Smith LLP, 415.659.5948, appearing for the Defendants.

Ruling: ARGUED. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS ANTHEM BLUE CROSS AND REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's NOTICE OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT as follows: As plaintiffs effectively concede they should be, defendants' demurrers are SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Several of the issues raised should have been resolved in the meet-and-confer required by Code of Civil Procedure 430.41. If an amended complaint is filed, counsel are urged to meet and confer in good faith before filing any more demurrers. (See id.) Order signed. (please note: a single order was filed this date for both the demurrer and motion to strike - see order for full details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Lilienstein, Esq. of DL Law Group, 415.678.5050, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Karen Braje, Esq. of Reed Smith LLP, 415.659.5948, appearing for the Defendants.

Ruling: ARGUED. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on
DEFENDANTS ANTHEM BLUE CROSS AND REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE as follows: Given the contemporaneous ruling on their demurrers, defendants' motion to strike is MOOT. Again, if an amended complaint is filed, counsel are urged to meet and confer in good faith before filing further pleading motions. Order signed. (please note: a single order was filed this date for both the demurrer and motion to strike - see order for full details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/RBU)
